title: How to get a police certificate – Ireland - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Ireland
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
Apply in person or by mail to the superintendent who is in charge of the district where you live or lived.
- There is no centralized police computer system serving county superintendent offices, and each county’s Garda Síochána office issues their own certificates.
- Apply for a police certificate for each county have lived in during the time period stated in your application package or document checklist.
For more information, visit the Garda Síochána website .
Contact information for each district is available on the Irish National Police Station Directory .
An Garda Síochána Headquarters
Address: Phoenix Park, Dublin 8, D08 HN3X
Telephone: +353 1 666 0000
